form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Karen Jewel at this track last start over 295m (17.19). Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when seventh but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Won his last seven in a row including a strong win last start over 295m at this track by 5.5 lengths in a Class 3. Well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last seven in a row including a strong win last start over 295m at this track by 5.5 lengths in a Class 3. Well placed and should feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Eased and turned head outwards in home straight fell.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 295m in 16.97 last start, beating Mercedes Jewel. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 295m in 16.97 last start, beating Mercedes Jewel. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on March 12 at this track over 295m. Last start was third over 295m in 17.16, behind Opawa Elvis. Going better than form suggests. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Working his way into winning form after his success on March 12 at this track over 295m. Last start was third over 295m in 17.16, behind Opawa Elvis. Going better than form suggests. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 5th on April 9 over 295m at this track behind Opawa Elvis beaten 7 lengths (17.39) in a Class 4. Boasts a course and distance PB in a lightning 16.85. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Awkwardly exiting bend and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 295m at this track, beaten 25 lengths. Not keen, needs to lift.

formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 295m at this track, beaten 25 lengths. Not keen, needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide, awkwardly interference shortly after start and dropped.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at her last run before a break of three-and-a-half months when seventh at this track over 295m. Others preferred this time.
